code:
import io
import string

fn count_digit(_ line: String, _ target: Int) -> Int
  mut count = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == target
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  count
end

fn hashes(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

mut line = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  line = s
when None
  ()
end

mut d = 0
while d < 10
  let c = count_digit(line, 48 + d)
  print("#{d}: #{hashes(c)}")
  d = d + 1
end
